post.content:
Experience: 2 YOE

Round 1: Phone Screen (45 Mins)
One DSA problem with followup. Problem was around heapsort. 

Round 2: Technical Interview DSA (1 Hour)
Introduction and talk about the project.
Backtracking and grid based problem.

Round 3: Technical Interview LLD (1 Hour)
Introduction and indepth talk about the past projects.
Design a system for booking conference rooms.
LLD + coding

Round 4: Technical Interview HLD (1 Hour)
Introduction and indepth talk about the past projects.
Design a system to generate top K trending items.

Round 5: Behavioural Round
Introduction and discussion on various projects I worked on and why we used a certain solution.
Senario based behavioural questions.

Round 6: SQL Round
Windowing based question where you were supposed to generate sequences. Don't remember the full question, will update later.
Hi OP. Please help me by confirming whether this is for the backend role or the data engineer role?
Is this for backend role? I have an interview coming up next week, can you tell me what questions was asked in R1?
how did you receive the interview call?\n
Can the  \'booking conference rooms\' LLD question be solved using Mediator pattern ?
